theme_archetype.rationale: Aligns with user request for strict Black and White, clean, minimal SaaS-like UI. Represents authority, clarity, and trust for educational counseling.

technical_rules: Strictly use React Native components: View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, TextInput, Image.
All styling MUST use StyleSheet.create(). NO Tailwind CSS, NO HTML, NO className.
Include `testID` property (React Native's data-testid) on all interactive and key UI elements (e.g., testID="login-submit-button").

color_system.rules: Strictly Grayscale. NO primary colored buttons. NO teal, blue, or purple. Use heavy black for actions, gray for disabled.

patterns.alignment: Left-align dense text. Center-align hero text and main actions.

Button.primary: backgroundColor: '#000000', borderRadius: 100, paddingVertical: 16, paddingHorizontal: 32, alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center'
Button.secondary: backgroundColor: 'transparent', borderWidth: 1, borderColor: '#E5E5E5', borderRadius: 100, paddingVertical: 16, paddingHorizontal: 32, alignItems: 'center'

Card.elevated: backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF', shadowColor: '#000', shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 8 }, shadowOpacity: 0.05, shadowRadius: 24, elevation: 4

Input.base: height: 56, backgroundColor: '#F5F5F5', borderRadius: 12, paddingHorizontal: 16, fontSize: 16, color: '#000000', borderWidth: 1, borderColor: 'transparent'

GlassHeader.rules: Use Expo BlurView with intensity={50} and tint='light' for floating top navs and bottom tab bars.

RoleSelection.design: Massive touch targets (50% screen height each) for 'Student' and 'Mentor'. Pure monochrome contrast.

StudentDashboard.design: H2 Greeting. Black AI Action Card with white text. Horizontal ScrollView for 'Upcoming Sessions'. 2-column Grid for 'Recommended Mentors'.

MentorProfile.design: Top hero image (maxHeight: 300). Clean sheet overlay curving up. Large typography for name and rating. Fixed glassmorphism bottom bar for 'Book Session' action.

CollegeRecommender.design: Bento box style vertical list. Cards containing high-quality monochrome images of campuses. 1px gray borders.

AIChatAssistant.design: Message bubbles: User gets black bg/white text. AI gets gray bg/black text. Input area fixed at bottom.

SessionBooking.design: Minimalist calendar grid. Only numbers visible. Selected date is a black circle. Time slots as rounded secondary pills.

EarningsDashboard.design: Massive typography for total balance. Custom minimal bar chart (black rectangles on gray tracks). No axis lines.

ProfileBuilder.design: Multi-step form. 1 massive input per screen. Generous top padding. Progress bar (black line) at top.

instructions_to_main_agent: NEVER use placeholder domains like via.placeholder.com. ONLY use the Unsplash URLs provided.
This is an Expo React Native app. You MUST use StyleSheet.create. DO NOT USE className, Tailwind, or web tags like <div>.
Implement testID on all interactive elements. Example: <TouchableOpacity testID='submit-btn'>
Strict monochrome only: Do not introduce ANY arbitrary colors for alerts or success. Rely on black, gray borders, and distinct shapes.
